calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Nov-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoena To Wells Fargo Bank
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Nicole Engler, Esq. 415-788-1900 Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney for Plaintiff.
Tony Andre, Esq. 415-398-3344 Stinson LLP for Other Wells Fargo
Josue Cristobal Guerrero, Esq. 213-785-3790 Greenacre Law for Defendant Maybain Lee.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states an untimelynotice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court admonishes Counsel; states issues- untimely notice to contest, courtesy copies, proof of service. Ms. Engler presents arguments; received paperwork, inconsistencies.
Mr. Guerrero states their notice is at 11am instead of the proper time and presents arguments. Mr. Andre has nothing further to add, notice issue less than 16 court days.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiffs Yenny Chow, Maythane Woo, William Woo and Sam Woo's unopposed Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoena To Wells Fargo Bank.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. The matter is Denied without Prejudice for failure of proof that both Defendants and bank were timely served consistent with CCP 1005(b). Ms. Engler to submit a new proposed order by today.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
